refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it clarifies the specific analysis tasks (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) that collectively produce the worksite model/map, aligning with stakeholder needs and acceptance criteria.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data from site surveys and sensor inputs; validate completeness and accuracy of terrain, obstacle, and work-zone representations.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite
Identify and represent work-zone boundaries and areas

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis algorithm using sensor fusion
Work-zone boundary extraction and mapping logic
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated worksite analysis framework combining terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone mapping algorithms

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection
coupling_check.notes: The integrated framework logically groups related analysis functions, minimizing cross-module dependencies and enabling modular updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data for accurate analysis
Risk of algorithm performance degradation in adverse environmental conditions
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor data quality and algorithm robustness; consider fallback strategies for degraded data scenarios.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and analysis of worksite data to produce the worksite model/map

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data and vehicle state information for analysis

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite model/map data to planning and execution modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and teleoperation modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite analysis is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Limited containment; vehicle module focuses on control and actuation, not analysis.
Minimal containment; teleoperation focuses on remote control, not data analysis.
Some interface for safety alerts but not primary containment for mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite analysis within NGHE Solution module optimizes data processing efficiency and reduces interface complexity.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Risk of delayed updates if data flow is not well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for scalability; ensure robust data pipelines.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and stakeholder acceptance criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with minimal ambiguity.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution module to avoid bottlenecks
Plan for fallback or degraded mode operation in case of sensor data issues

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite
Identify and represent work-zone boundaries and areas

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Stable network link for data exchange
open_risks: Algorithm performance under adverse environmental conditions
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance validation results of analysis algorithms
